zh.of Thornhill, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾
英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice Talboner於1268年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾時，她的父親William Talboner61歲，母親Elizabeth Thornhill Talboner25歲。她於1287年與John Thornhill在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1329年在英國越可爾恩爾享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice Talboner于1268年出生在英国英格兰越可爾恩爾时，她的父亲William Talboner61岁，母亲Elizabeth Thornhill Talboner25岁。她于1287年与John Thornhill在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1329年在英国越可爾恩爾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice Talboner was born in 1268, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Talboner, was 61 and her mother, Elizabeth Thornhill Talboner, was 25. She married John Thornhill in 1287, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1329, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice Talboner est née en 1268, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Talboner, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Thornhill Talboner, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Thornhill en 1287, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1329, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice Talboner 1268 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Talboner 61 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Thornhill Talboner 25. Sie hat 1287 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom John Thornhill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1329 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Talboner è nata il nel 1268 nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Talboner, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Thornhill Talboner, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John Thornhill nel 1287, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1329, nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.Thornhill, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒル
ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice Talbonerが1268年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで生まれた時，父William Talbonerは61歳，母Elizabeth Thornhill Talbonerは25歳であった。1287年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドでJohn Thornhillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1329年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Talboner(이)가 1268년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Talboner(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Thornhill Talboner(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 John Thornhill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1329년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Talboner nasceu em 1268, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Talboner, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Thornhill Talboner, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Thornhill em 1287, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1329, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice Talboner родилась в 1268 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Talboner было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Thornhill Talboner, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thornhill в 1287 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1329 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice Talboner nació en 1268, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Talboner, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Thornhill Talboner, tenía 25 años. Se casó con John Thornhill en 1287, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1329, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
